nasb.text: Boaz replied to her, “All that you have done for your mother-in-law after the death of your husband has been fully reported to me, and how you left your father and your mother and the land of your birth, and came to a people that you did not previously know.

esv.text: But Boaz answered her, “All that you have done for your mother-in-law since the death of your husband has been fully told to me, and how you left your father and mother and your native land and came to a people that you did not know before.

cnv.text: 波阿斯回答她說：“自從你丈夫去世以後，你對婆婆所行的，和你怎樣離開父母與出生之地，來到素來不認識的人中間，這一切我都知道得很清楚了。

ccb.text: 波阿斯说：“自从你丈夫过世之后，你怎样善待婆婆，怎样离开父母和家乡来到素不相识的人当中，我都听说了。

csbs.text: 波阿斯回答她，说：“你的丈夫去世以后，你为你婆婆所做的一切，以及你怎样离开你的父母和出生地，来到从前不认识的人中，这些我都一一听说了。
